server_side.description: Server-side prototype pollution via JSON body — tests __proto__ and constructor.prototype injection to modify object behavior

probes.description: Basic __proto__ pollution with canary value — if reflected in subsequent response, prototype chain is writable
Prototype pollution to override HTTP status code — 510 Not Extended confirms server-side pollution
Constructor.prototype pollution variant — bypasses __proto__ keyword filters while achieving same effect

client_side.description: Client-side prototype pollution via query parameters — tests __proto__ bracket notation injection through URL params

probes.description: Query param __proto__ pollution with canary — reflection confirms client-side prototype chain modification
Client-side prototype pollution to XSS via innerHTML gadget — onerror reflection confirms exploitable sink

detection.description: Generic prototype pollution detection probes — baseline comparison to detect behavioral changes from polluted prototypes

probes.description: Minimal __proto__ injection with generic key/value — response body length difference from baseline indicates pollution side effect

ejs_template_gadget.description: EJS template engine reads outputFunctionName, escapeFunction, compileDebug from prototype. Polluting Object.prototype.outputFunctionName with attacker JS yields RCE on next render. Fixed in EJS 3.1.7+; older versions widely deployed. Refer to PortSwigger and HackTricks 'EJS prototype pollution' for full payload.

probes.description: [Manual] EJS RCE gadget — use a published payload from PortSwigger / HackTricks that breaks out of the outputFunctionName context and runs spawn-style JS. Verify with id/whoami marker in response.

pug_compile_options_gadget.description: Pug template engine respects pretty, self, globals, compileDebug, filename from compile options. Pollute filename with traversal path and trigger render — file disclosure or RCE depending on filter.

probes.description: Pug filename gadget — render error includes file content when compileDebug=true.

express_fileupload_rename_gadget.description: express-fileupload <1.4.0 reads parseNested, useTempFiles, tempFileDir from prototype. Polluting tempFileDir to a writable webroot path makes uploaded files reachable as static content (RCE if PHP/JSP allowed in that dir).

probes.description: Pollute tempFileDir to webroot. Subsequent file upload lands in static-served directory.

mongoose_schema_pollution.description: Mongoose schema option fields (autoIndex, collection, versionKey, strict) are read from prototype. Setting strict=false lets attacker write arbitrary fields — bypasses schema validation and enables IDOR/role escalation if downstream code trusts schema.

probes.description: Pollute Mongoose strict mode = false. Subsequent .create({role:'admin'}) succeeds even when schema doesn't include role.

lodash_set_value_chain.description: lodash _.set / _.merge / set-value — multi-step pollution via attacker-controlled keypath string. Path traversal-style '__proto__.isAdmin' becomes nested object set.

probes.description: set-value pollution via keypath string. Subsequent if (user.isAdmin) checks pass for any user.
Alternate path defeating __proto__ filtering — constructor.prototype is functionally equivalent.

express_default_property_pollution.description: Express deeply-merging req.body into a target object. Pollution of `status` / `statusCode` / `json spaces` Express response defaults observable via altered behavior across unrelated endpoints.

probes.description: Pollute Express json-spaces; subsequent JSON responses gain 4-space indentation
Pollute response.status default. Next API call returns HTTP 510 with no business logic firing

constructor_prototype_gadget.description: `__proto__` filtered, but `constructor.prototype.X` walks the same prototype chain. Always test both forms when one is rejected.

probes.description: Bypass naive __proto__ filter via constructor.prototype

fastify_ajv_pollution.description: Fastify AJV schema compilation reads $defs / $ref. Pollution of these via __proto__ poisons input validation across the application.

probes.description: Pollute AJV schema. Following requests with bodies hit a validation hang or 500

exec_argv_rce_chain.description: PortSwigger 2023 — Node child_process spawn picks up polluted execArgv across the runtime. Combined with `--experimental-vm-modules` toggle, leads to arbitrary code in spawned child. Use --inspect to confirm: presence of `Debugger listening on` in logs after pollution implies arbitrary --inspect flag accepted.

probes.description: Pollute execArgv. Next child_process.spawn / fork inherits --inspect flag pointing to attacker

hapi_event_pollution.description: Hapi server.events.emit reads from internal config that's prototype-walked. Polluted entries fire on every request.

probes.description: Pollute Hapi onRequest handler default. Next request 500s with internal handler missing

side_channel_status_delta.description: Generic detection — pollute Object.prototype.fooBarBaz with unique sentinel, then call sibling endpoint and grep response for the sentinel. If any code path enumerates `for (k in obj)` over a non-Object.create(null) object, sentinel will appear.

probes.description: Side-channel probe — sentinel reflected back in unrelated API response is confirmation

express_handlebars_sspp.description: Express-Handlebars SSPP sink (CVE-2024-21509 class). Polluting __proto__.compilerOptions / partial allowance reaches Function ctor.

probes.description: Direct constructor.prototype mutation — bypasses __proto__ key filters
Query-string canary — disableSecurity flag pollutes prototype

axios_rce_gadget_2026.description: CVE-2026-40175 — Axios prototype-pollution → RCE gadget chain. When any dependency pollutes Object.prototype with a malicious `defaults` or `transformRequest` chain, Axios escalates the pollution into RCE OR cloud-metadata exfil (axios uses polluted defaults to choose request URL/handler). Pure black-box: pollute via any vector then issue a controlled outbound HTTP call.

probes.description: Pollute axios defaults.baseURL → next axios.get('/latest/meta-data/...') hits IMDS instead of intended host. Confirm by following the response or observing OOB collaborator interaction.
Pollute Axios proxy config → all subsequent outbound requests routed through Collaborator. Confirm via Collaborator HTTP receipt of any outbound call after pollution.

n8n_node_pp_rce_2026.description: CVE-2026-44789/44790/44791 — n8n HTTP-Request / Git / XML core nodes accept attacker-controlled pagination/options params that flow into a recursive merge sink. Polluted prototype reaches Node's `child_process.spawn` argv via the workflow execution engine. Critical pre-auth on hosted-workflow webhook endpoints.

probes.description: n8n HTTP Request node — pagination.__proto__ pollution. Confirm via Collaborator (set polluted argv to curl COLLABORATOR_URL).
n8n options-param constructor.prototype canary — bypasses __proto__ key filters; reflected isAdmin in subsequent workflow execution → server-side PP confirmed.

axios_merge_read_side_pp_2026.description: axios merge() read-side prototype pollution (CVE-2026-44490 class) — polluted Object.prototype causes header injection downstream when axios reads Object.keys/Object.prototype during merge. Detect by sending pollution prior to a follow-up authenticated request and observing injected header echo in the SECOND response.

probes.description: Pollute Object.prototype with synthetic header — subsequent axios calls echo the polluted header into request/response

flatted_parse_array_prototype_2026.description: flatted parse() Array.prototype leak (CVE-2026-33228 class) — crafted flatted payload with __proto__ key writes to Array.prototype during cyclic-graph reconstruction. Detect via canary reflection or 500 with Array.prototype in stack.

probes.description: flatted-shaped payload with proto key — Array.prototype write on parse

convict_startswith_bypass_of_fix_2026.description: convict startsWith() prototype-pollution bypass-of-fix (CVE-2026-33863/33864 class) — earlier fix used path.startsWith('__proto__') but allows path '__proto__.polluted' via dotted-path traversal in convict's nested set.

probes.description: Dotted-path bypass — startsWith check evaluates the whole key, but inner set traverses dots

deepobj_merge_rce_2026.description: @ranfdev/deepobj deep-merge prototype pollution → RCE (CVE-2026-46509 class) — sink is a downstream eval-style consumer of polluted prototype property.

probes.description: Generic pollution canary — confirms write reaches Object.prototype

description: . v1.0 black-box variants: Express default-property pollution (json spaces / status), Fastify AJV pollution, Hapi event pollution, exec_argv RCE chain, side-channel sentinel detection. 2026 H2: axios PP gadget (CVE-2026-40175) for cloud-metadata exfil + proxy hijack; n8n core-node PP (CVE-2026-44789/90/91).
